mapper.select:
SELECT sci.id, CONCAT(sci.card_no, ' - ', sci.secret_code) AS card_no, sci.status, sci.use_time, sci.user_account FROM edu_study_card_instance sci WHERE sci.card_id = #{cardId} AND sci.deleted = 0
AND sci.status = #{query.status}
AND sci.card_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.cardNo}, '%')
AND sci.user_account LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.userAccount}, '%')
ORDER BY sci.id DESC
SELECT id, card_id, card_no, secret_code, status, use_time, user_id, user_account, create_time, update_time, deleted FROM edu_study_card_instance WHERE card_no = #{cardNo} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, card_id, card_no, secret_code, status, use_time, user_id, user_account, create_time, update_time, deleted FROM edu_study_card_instance WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY use_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_study_card_instance (card_id, card_no, secret_code, status, user_id, user_account, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{cardId}, #{cardNo}, #{secretCode}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{userAccount}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO edu_study_card_instance (card_id, card_no, secret_code, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.cardId}, #{item.cardNo}, #{item.secretCode}, #{item.status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_study_card_instance SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_study_card_instance SET status = 1, use_time = NOW(), user_id = #{userId}, user_account = #{userAccount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_study_card_instance SET status = 2, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_study_card_instance SET user_id = #{userId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_study_card_instance WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_study_card_instance WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_study_card_instance WHERE card_id = #{cardId} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_study_card_instance WHERE card_id = #{cardId} AND status = 0 AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, card_id, card_no, secret_code, status, use_time, user_id, user_account, create_time, update_time, deleted FROM edu_study_card_instance WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_study_card_instance SET status = #{status}, use_time = #{useTime}, user_id = #{userId}, user_account = #{userAccount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_study_card_instance SET deleted = 1 WHERE card_id = #{cardId}

UPDATE edu_study_card_instance SET status = 1, user_id = #{userId}, use_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = ( SELECT id FROM ( SELECT id FROM edu_study_card_instance WHERE card_id = #{cardId} AND status = 0 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT 1 ) tmp )
